issue_title: Fix split wide characters when overlapping writes occur
issue_body_preview:
## Summary

- When two elements overlap in the output grid (via `position="absolute"`, negative margins, etc.) and the write lands in the middle of a wide (CJK) character, one half of the character was left behind, corrupting terminal output
- Add left/right boundary checks in `Output.write()` to re
test_description_zh: 在 Ink 终端 UI 中，使用 position='absolute' 或负 margin 让两个包含宽字符（如中文/日文/韩文）的元素发生重叠，观察重叠区域的字符渲染结果。
expected_result_zh: 当两个元素重叠且写入位置落在宽字符（CJK字符）的中间时，被覆盖的宽字符应被完整清除或正确替换，不应出现半个宽字符残留导致的终端输出乱码或字符损坏现象。
